_basis: pairs = candidate universe C(206 HL perps, 2) per pair-universe-spec.md (screening funnel is part of each strategy's procedure, mirroring how single-asset counts use the full profiled universe with entry gates as strategy rules); pair_capable_designs = stat-arb row design count from the matrix; basket_capable_designs = conservative estimate of the rotation/momentum/cross-sectional subfamily documented as basket deployers.
